name: Kibbee (Lamb and Bulgur)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the coarsely ground lamb, pine nuts, and salt. Season to taste with pepper.
2. Melt 1 tablespoon butter, add the meat mixture, and cook, stirring to keep it crumbly, until light brown.
3. Rinse bulgur and drain by squeezing handfuls. Combine with 1 pound of ground lean lamb, minced onion, ground oregano, and salt. Season to taste with pepper. Mix well.
4. Press a layer of the lamb mixture into a 9-inch pie plate.
5. Top with nut stuffing, then with another layer of meat. Smooth the surface of the meat with wet hands.
6. Dot with 2 tablespoons butter.
7. Bake at 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes, or until the meat reaches the desired degree of doneness.
